data.body:
368c IMPLEMENTED via held-out subagent (saw ONLY happy-path test + stub + ticket intent; edge/era/replay oracle withheld). Result: src/rebar/attest/opcert.py (register_opcert_policy pins rebar.opcert.v1->sshsig; sign_opcert builds in-toto Statement binding {ticket_id,material_fingerprint,merged_log_commit} digest, signs via SSHSIG; verify_opcert 3-phase: subject-binding->mismatch, any-historical-key->mismatch if none, era via git merge-base --is-ancestor->certified/key_not_valid_at_era) + wired into attest/__init__.py.
VALIDATION: full held-out oracle 12/12 GREEN (impl generalized to cases it never saw: replay onto diff ticket/mutated material, past-rotation + not-yet-added era, foreign-key mismatch, fail-closed).
TEETH (mutation check): removed revoke-exclusion -> past-rotation test RED; disabled subject-binding -> both replay tests RED; restore -> 12/12 GREEN. Oracle non-tautological.
PRE-FLIGHT: make lint PASS, make typecheck PASS (309 files), attest/registry/signing regression subset 49/49 PASS. Full make test running (bhc8c71gl). Next: commit (garlicky-deviant-kakapo) + push to gerrit refs/for/main as base of stack.
